name: stockyard-retrypilot
description: Smart retry engine with exponential backoff, circuit breakers, deadline awareness, and automatic model downgrade on failures.

tools.name: retrypilot_stats
tools.description: Get retry statistics: total retries, success rate, avg retries per request.

tools.name: retrypilot_circuit_status
tools.description: Get circuit breaker status for each model: closed, open, or half-open.

tools.name: retrypilot_reset_circuit
tools.description: Manually reset a tripped circuit breaker.

tools.name: retrypilot_budget
tools.description: Get retry budget status: retries used this minute, remaining.

tools.name: retrypilot_proxy_status
tools.description: Check if the RetryPilot proxy is running and healthy.
